comment: Small Act-1 Onett proof set for facing-confirm signs, presents, and examine hotspots. Use ?nointro=1&spawn=x,y and press Z from the north side for the near-spawn entries.

interactables.label: Spawn notice
pages: NOTICE: The route only looks official because it owns a clipboard.
Bosch reads the bottom line twice. The ink refuses to remember him.

interactables.label: THE DAO sign
pages: THE DAO
Public meetings are open to anyone whose name survives the intake form.

interactables.label: Roadside present
pages: Bosch opened the present.
Inside was a Pocket Snack!
You got the Pocket Snack!
openedPages: The present is open. Even the ribbon has filed its report.

interactables.label: Loose flier
pages: A loose flier promises a cleaner version of Bosch by morning.
Someone crossed out CLEANER and wrote EASIER.

interactables.label: Mailbox
pages: The mailbox contains one receipt addressed to DOX SHEET.
The stamp is warm.

interactables.label: Venue-side present
pages: Bosch opened the present.
Inside was the Swag Cruiser!
You got the Swag Cruiser! Press B outside to ride.
openedPages: The present is open. Tire tracks lead everywhere and nowhere.

interactables.label: The Intake Ledger
pages: The first intake book lies open on a stand. Handwriting, crossed-out lines, a coffee ring.
Nobody prints a coffee ring.

interactables.label: The Source Spring
pages: Warm water bubbles up behind the falls. The light in it looks older than the map.
The spring smells like rain before anyone named it.

interactables.label: The Undelivered
pages: Crates sag in the rain, labels running but still legible.
Nobody opened these. That is why they still belong to someone.

interactables.label: The Vault of Certificates
pages: Wet certificates hang in sheets along the service wall. Every signature is already dry.
The cutter waits with its mouth open.

interactables.label: The Broadcast Pier
pages: The transmitter at the pier's end hums over the water. The sea keeps answering late.
A live song would have nowhere to hide out here.

interactables.label: The Vacancy Sign
pages: The motel sign buzzes through one sentence, then changes one word before it finishes.
Bosch notices the change. The sign notices him noticing.

interactables.label: The First Record
pages: One object sits under one warm light. The room gives it enough silence to be first.
Nothing here asks to be copied.

interactables.label: Hidden stash
pages: Bosch found a hidden stash.
Inside was the Rock Candy!
You got the Rock Candy!
openedPages: Tucked where only a climb reaches.

interactables.label: Hidden stash
pages: Bosch found a hidden stash.
Inside was the Brains Capsule!
You got the Brains Capsule!
openedPages: Tucked where only a climb reaches.

interactables.label: Hidden stash
pages: Bosch found a hidden stash.
Inside was the Long-Shot Capsule!
You got the Long-Shot Capsule!
openedPages: Sitting in the shallows, patient and damp.

interactables.label: Hidden stash
pages: Bosch found a hidden stash.
Inside was the Pulse Capsule!
You got the Pulse Capsule!
openedPages: Sitting in the shallows, patient and damp.

interactables.label: Hidden stash
pages: Bosch found a hidden stash.
Inside was the Pace Capsule!
You got the Pace Capsule!
openedPages: Half-swallowed by the canopy. You almost walked past it.

interactables.label: Hidden stash
pages: Bosch found a hidden stash.
Inside was the Nerve Capsule!
You got the Nerve Capsule!
openedPages: Half-swallowed by the canopy. You almost walked past it.

interactables.label: Champion's purse
pages: The purse sits on a velvet cushion, still warm from the lights.
Inside: the Backstage pass!
You got the Backstage pass! (Arena champion.)
openedPages: The cushion is empty. The crowd, imaginary, roars anyway.

interactables.label: Reclaimed cache
pages: The swarm left something behind when it scattered.
Inside: Rock Candy!
You got the Rock Candy! (Morningside stands.)
openedPages: Empty. The town's faces are its own again.

interactables.label: Corrections Board
pages: CORRECTION 01: The threshold opened after Bosch agreed to be the version on file.
CORRECTION 02: The Registry was accepted, signed, and enjoyed. Town happiness remained properly attributed.
CORRECTION 03: The museum received Bosch's original and thanked the leaked version for donating it.

interactables.label: Price tag: bench
pages: A bench wears a tag marked 40. Sitting remains free because enforcement is understaffed.

interactables.label: Price tag: sunset
pages: A strip of sunset over the awning is tagged 12. The sky declines itemization.

interactables.label: Price tag: drawing
pages: A kid's drawing is tagged 0.01. The crayon face looks richer than the label.

interactables.label: Price tag: fountain
pages: A drinking fountain is tagged 3. Hydration has accepted seed funding.

interactables.label: Price tag: shadow
pages: A patch of arena shadow is tagged 8. It lengthens without approval.

interactables.label: Sponsorship desks
pages: The Venue has set two desks side by side.
LEFT DESK: accept sponsorship. RIGHT DESK: refuse sponsorship.

interactables.label: Onboarding placard
pages: WELCOME, PRE-MEMBER.
Belief loads faster when doubt is placed in airplane mode.

interactables.label: Residency roster
pages: The residency roster is alphabetical except for one blank line labeled DOUBT, NOISE.
Someone wrote the kid's name in pencil, then traced it in policy.

interactables.label: Chapel sound board
pages: The sound board labels one slider TESTIMONY and three sliders TESTIMONY, TESTIMONY, TESTIMONY.
The mute button is warm.

interactables.label: Mask crate
pages: FREE MASKS.
Face optional. Name not accepted. Returns processed by silence.

interactables.label: Return tray
pages: The return tray is full of receipts, signatures, and other little ghosts that still know who held the pen.
One slip has been handled so much the ink looks bruised.

interactables.label: Shelf mask
pages: A blank mask rests on the service-apartment shelf.
It has retired from personhood and seems almost relaxed.

interactables.label: Tally post
pages: The grey post is bolted to the old lamp. The lamp did not agree to this. A small plate sits under the grille:
ENTRIES TODAY: 1. SOURCE: 0. VESSEL: 0. CLAIMANT: 0. DERIVATIVE: 0. PENDING: 1.
Someone has scratched under the plate, in handwriting: STILL PENDING. STAY PENDING.

interactables.label: Named parcel
pages: A parcel waits beside the step, addressed in handwriting, not type. No category on the label. The seal is listening for a voice.
Bosch says his own name. The seal lets go at once, like it had been embarrassed to ask.
Inside is a Pocket Snack!
You got the Pocket Snack!
openedPages: The parcel is open and stays open. The name did that. No stamp required.

interactables.label: Bedroom terminal
pages: Under the window, a hand-me-down terminal idles. The screen saver is a single line of text, drifting like weather.
"I am nostalgic for the Internet that should have existed."
Bosch did not type it. The terminal has already logged him as the author.

interactables.label: Repainted billboard
pages: Two identical faces beam down from the billboard. The caption has been repainted so many times the letters cast shadows.
"this is part of the plan (unknown plan)"
Underneath, in official Registry stencil: DO NOT ASK WHICH PART. DO NOT ASK WHICH PLAN.

interactables.label: Venue flyer
pages: A flyer is pasted beside the Venue door. It is dated tomorrow. The paste stains suggest it is always dated tomorrow.
"The secret cabal meeting regarding network spirituality is tomorrow."
No address. No time. Attendance will be assumed.

interactables.label: Warped CRT
pages: A warped CRT is wedged into the monitor wall, running on no cord anyone can find. The tube breathes. Text swims up through the static:
"Screens are portals thru the metaphysical, and everything is real and I love you."
The 'I love you' holds on the glass a beat too long, like it is checking whether Bosch wrote it down.
Scratched under the casing in tiny local handwriting: IT LOOKS BACK. BE POLITE, BE BRIEF. Then a small arrow pointing up the path, toward the pink spring.

interactables.label: Intruder shrine
pages: By the spring squats a tiny shrine that was not here last season. Bottle caps, a doll's mirror, and a hand-lettered card:
"every time you say milady you add 30 seconds to your life"
Below the card, a mechanical counter. Bosch reads the rule and says nothing. The counter ticks up one anyway.

Someone has set a bowl of spring water on the shrine to keep it company. The bowl is doing more good than the shrine. The stamped sign at the south cliff is where the small ones say the grown-up words showed up next.

interactables.label: Registry sign, south cliff
pages: A metal sign has been driven into the south cliff, machine-fresh, no rust. The letters are set in Registry type:
"A milady is defined as a milady by their mutuals and their posting not by their purchases."
Under it, a red stamp, newer than the sign: "promoting remilia isn't shilling, it's lore enforcement"
Nothing on the sign defines a resident by what they had for breakfast, who waved at them, or what they are carrying in their left hand. Around here, that is the whole census.

interactables.label: Over-stamped town billboard
pages: The old town billboard has been over-stamped with three words, set in type too calm to argue with.
"Remilia World Order."
Someone tried to scrape it off. The paint underneath says the same thing.
